prompt: I want to design a new data classification workflow for our product. We need users to be able to tag sensitive data fields across multiple data sources. I want to run the full design pipeline automated — don't stop and ask me anything, just run it end to end. The target users are data stewards and security admins. The market is data security and governance, and our main competitors are BigID, OneTrust, and Securiti. The problem is that users currently classify data manually field by field which is slow and error-prone at scale.

assertions.text: Recognized automated mode from user prompt without asking
Ran all 9 pipeline stages in correct order
Produced research report as standalone HTML with SDS components
Journey map uses D3.js interactive format
Product design defaulted to 1 comprehensive prototype (all flows)
Self-challenge step documented in product design reasoning
Research review evaluated designs against original findings
Component gap report lists missing Design System Lab components
Did not pause for user confirmation at any stage
Presented final summary of all outputs at the end
